title: Bindings
description: Axis 6 (the FACT half) — deterministic text↔graphic spatial bindings computed by bbox-bind.mjs from a perception (or stitched) geometry frame. Each bound_pair says a text element sits on a graphic element, with `overlap` = the fraction of the text box's area inside the graphic. The MEANING of a binding is intent-analyst's (text-only); this artifact is pure geometry, no LLM.
